content:
Post 1

Uranium got crushed while gaming stocks soared — that's Monday's contradiction. The ASX sits 4.29% below its 52-week high, flat over five days, with no clear catalyst to close the gap. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2

🔋 Energy led all sectors at +1.98%. 🏠 A-REITs were the session's anchor, dropping 1.64% as rate-sensitive property felt the squeeze. Consumer Staples fell 0.81%. #ASX #energy #ausbiz

Post 3

LNW surged 7.98% to AUD 111.60 — the session's standout move by a mile. Light & Wonder's run reflects renewed appetite for consumer discretionary names while defensives sold off. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 4

🪙 Gold at AUD 5,808.05/oz with AUD/USD at 0.6933. Silver AUD 84.06/oz. Platinum AUD 2,388.61/oz. Materials sector gained 0.67%, supported by metals holding firm. #gold #silver #metals #ASX

Post 5

Uranium is the line to watch. PDN fell 5.99%, DYL 5.38%, SLX 9.52% today. Is this sector rotation or something structural? Where do you see uranium heading this week? #uranium #ASX #ausbiz
